title: Immediate Advancement Screenshot
description: Immediately take a screenshot when get an advancement.
body:
Immediately take a screenshot when get an advancement.
## Why not [Advancement Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-screenshot)?
I actually used this mod at first, but I found that it only takes screenshot when the toast shows up. If some mod defers the toast in some GUI, it doesn't take screenshot until you close the GUI. And it doesn't compatible with [Screenshot Organisation](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-organisation). So I made this mod for personal use.
